message:
feat(iter): add ndindex and ndenumerate N-dimensional iterators

Implement two NumPy-compatible iteration functions for generating
multi-dimensional coordinate sequences:

- ndindex(shape): generates Cartesian coordinate tuples in C-order
  (row-major) for a given shape, matching numpy.ndindex
- ndenumerate(shape, values): pairs each coordinate tuple with its
  corresponding value, matching numpy.ndenumerate
- ndindex_element_count(): overflow-safe total element count helper
- NdindexShapeValidation error variant for invalid shape/value
  length mismatches

Includes 5 unit tests covering scalar shapes, 2D/3D iteration,
zero-extent dimensions, and value-shape mismatch rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
